name: Pistol
description: Standard semi-automatic pistol. Reliable but unremarkable.
tips: Good for early game. Upgrade to a better handgun when you can afford it.

name: SMG
description: Compact automatic weapon with rapid fire rate. Deadly up close but inaccurate beyond.
acquisition: Purchased from Ammu-Nation or found on gang members.
tips: Best drive-by weapon. Pair with a vehicle for maximum effectiveness.

name: Assault Rifle
description: Full-auto assault rifle. Good all-rounder for mid-range combat.
tips: Best mid-game weapon. Pair with a scope for long-range encounters.

name: Shotgun
description: Pump-action shotgun. Devastating at close range.
acquisition: Found in police stations or purchased.
tips: One-shot kill at close range. Terrible beyond 20 meters.

name: Sniper Rifle
acquisition: Found on rooftops or purchased from Ammu-Nation.
tips: Use cover and high ground. Headshots are always lethal.

name: RPG
description: Fires explosive rockets with massive area damage. Slow to reload.
acquisition: Black market dealers or hidden weapon caches.
tips: One rocket takes out most vehicles. Very limited ammo — save for heavy targets.

name: Knife
description: Standard combat knife. Silent takedowns possible from behind.
tips: Silent kills don't alert nearby enemies. Essential for stealth approach missions.
